rule_title: Before preprocessing, a null statement shall only occur on a line by itself; it may be followed by a comment, provided that the first character following the null statement is a white-space character.
source_reference: Klocwork MISRA C++ 2008 checker map + Cppcheck public rule coverage page where available; licensed-source verification required
